RECEIVED CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET FROM THE COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES SHERIFF'S OFFICE.

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT MARGARITA MOLINA IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 2, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. MS. MOLINA TO E-MAIL A COPY OF THE UPDATED CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FORM TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF AND TO THE COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: IRENE TOFFT, CSR # 12313 =(302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARGARITA MOLINA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,767.435 AND TO RELEASE TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AS PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,767.435. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: IRENE TOFFT, CSR # 12313
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, MARGARITA

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROGER J. ILLSLEY OF THE MOSKOWILTZ LLP, TEL. NO. 1-707-525-8800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
MARGARITA MOLINDA, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - DEFENDANT MARGARITA MOLINA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor in the amount of $8,767.435 and to release to the judgment creditor as payment on the judgment in the amount of $8,767.435. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hl

MARGARITA MOLINA, TEL. NO. 1-415-297-1243, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.
